creator: pete@twisted.org.uk
text:
yes, the repo can only have old or new - but thats the reaosn for having two repos. There is the standard one which contains the "old" ports, and the extra repo for new_corg users specificly only containing the afected ports which need to be compiled with "NEW_XORG" set. That why you need to configure a second repo if you are using new_xorg.

The repo for "new" xorg does copntain the new packages for all of the other bits of X11, but this one was apparently missed. If you could pass on to X11 then that would be great - I dont think I have misiunderstood the reason for having the two repositories, and it could be fixed fairly easily I believe.

thanks!
